title: selaginella wallacei
intro: Selaginella wallacei, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Selaginella wallacei is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in supplement form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
